g.title: Initial state. No locks held on the database file.
Database is being read. Prevents exclusive writing.
Intent to write. Only one process can hold this.
Writing to disk. No other connections allowed.

div.p: Trigger: INSERT / UPDATE Guard: No other RESERVED lock Action: Pager acquire RESERVED
Trigger: COMMIT command Guard: All other readers closed Action: Flush WAL/Journal to disk

g.title: Initial state. No locks held on the database file.
Database is being read. Prevents exclusive writing.
Intent to write. Only one process can hold this.
Writing to disk. No other connections allowed.
